title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: blackwell-systems/polywave-go
summary: Provider-agnostic parallel agent coordination for LLMs — Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Parallel worktree isolation, interface contracts, and tier-gated execution at scale.

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Pi/Cursor) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu z.ai).

title: TFD-42/Ellana_Agent_Beta
summary: Ellana Local Agent — Optimized LLM-powered autonomous code generator.

title: gabrimatic/eyra
summary: Real-time AI screen analysis from the terminal. Local inference, voice interaction, adaptive model routing.

title: soenneker/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: evgenii-engineer/openLight
summary: Lightweight AI agent runtime for homelabs, built around deterministic skills and local LLMs.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: techreign/agent-cost-monitor
summary: Self-hosted AI agent cost monitor with cross-provider runaway detection.

title: Cerid-AI/cerid-ai
summary: Self-hosted, privacy-first Personal AI Knowledge Companion with RAG-powered retrieval, intelligent agents, and extensible SDK

title: santhosh-kambhampati/Lucy-AI-Companion
summary: Realtime AI desktop companion with wake-word activation, streaming conversations, interruption handling, desktop automation, and local LLM inference.

title: MarlBurroW/kinbot
summary: Self-hosted AI agents with persistent memory, real identity, and collaboration. One process, one SQLite file, zero cloud.

title: strands-agents/samples
summary: Agent samples built using the Strands Agents SDK.

title: HamdiBelhaj0013/Esprit-PIDEV-3A33-2026-LingualearnJava
summary: This project was developed as part of the PIDEV – 3rd Year Engineering Program at Esprit School of Engineering (Academic Year 2025–2026). LinguaLearn is a full-stack language learning platform

title: h3rb3rn/moe-sovereign
summary: Self-hosted Compound AI System for sovereign environments. Features token-saving complexity routing, deterministic MCP tools for math/logic, configurable expert templates, causal/reinforcement learning, agentic loops, and a federated Neo4j GraphRAG.

title: gabrimatic/personal_ollama_cli
summary: A Zsh-based CLI tool providing direct terminal access to local Ollama models with context management and session persistence.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: strands-agents/tools
summary: A set of tools that gives agents powerful capabilities.
